economic_notes: Nation has logging operations generating $493,654 in 2024. Lands and Resources is a significant segment. Economic Development segment had a large deficit. Nation holds 25% of Pelltiq't Energy Group Ltd. accounted for by modified equity method. BCFN Gaming Revenue Sharing received $386,096.
notes: Nation has 6 fully consolidated subsidiaries (Cougar Point Development Inc., High Bar Resources & Development LLP, Spirit Valley Development LP, Spirit Valley Development GP Ltd., Cougar Point Holdings Ltd., Cougar Point Holdings LP) and 1 equity-method investee (Pelltiq't Energy Group Ltd. at 25%). No schedule of remuneration disclosed. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($368,204) + Province of BC ($1,755,508) + Government of Canada ($969,953) + First Nations Health Authority ($92,132) = $3,185,797; osr includes investment income, logging, other income, gaming revenue sharing, SNTCS, other funding, Enbridge, contracting, revenue sharing. Honoraria of $39,576 likely represents council payments but no formal remuneration schedule provided. Education expenses include books/supplies, living allowance, and tuition consistent with post-secondary sponsorship but student count not disclosed. expenses_salaries_total is from Schedule 1 consolidated total only.
